name: dev-loop-hub
description: Local MCP system-of-record for the dev-loop agents (per-agent identity, tickets/comments/labels/events over node:sqlite). Zero native deps, zero build step (Node >=23 type-stripping + built-in node:sqlite). See ../docs/HUB-ARCHITECTURE.md.

scripts.test: node test/smoke.ts && node test/loop.ts && node test/isolation.ts && node test/docs.ts && node test/board.ts && node test/channel.ts && node test/mirror.ts && node test/identity.ts && node test/resolve-project.ts && node test/daemon.ts && node test/agent-api.ts && node test/shim.ts && node test/lifecycle.ts && node test/lifecycle-race.ts && node test/blocked.ts && node test/migrate.ts && node test/release.ts && node test/mcp-config.ts && node test/init-service.ts
